markschemeHtml:
a. same apparatus with carbon dioxide present;

b. (control has) no sodium hydroxide/alkali;

c. control irrigated with untreated water/water with CO2;

“Same apparatus” alone does not get the mark.

meta.title: Describe the control for this experiment.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
